series_metadata.series_title: Refund of Expenditure for Prior Year
series_metadata.series_description: Records that document receipts and payment where the original payment was made in error, duplicated, or made illegally within the biennium for the prior year.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: seven (7) state fiscal years or longer ensure that documents have been audited by Auditor of State, and ; Electronic: seven (7) state fiscal years or longer ensure that documents have been audited by Auditor of State, and
